title: juncus scabriusculus
intro: Juncus scabriusculus, also known as Rough-stemmed rush or Rough-stemmed jointed rush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Juncaceae, characterized by its jointed stems and small, greenish-yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Juncus scabriusculus include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Juncus scabriusculus can be made by infusing the plant in hot water to create a tea, or by using it in combination with other herbs in tinctures and salves.
